description.value:
Highland dueling countersigns — Skjoldfjellsmål highland duelists engrave a countersign into their off-hand item at the start of any formal duel, ensuring the item stays in hand no matter what happens; the technique adapts elegantly to implements.

Effect: Once per encounter, when an effect would cause you to drop your implement — whether from a forced drop, disarm, damage, or other trigger — you can keep hold of it (Director adjudicates the exact interaction).

Rules: Director adjudicates; Encounter.

project.prerequisites: An implement of at least quality craft; a countersign etched by a recognized Skjoldfjellsmål dueling master
